Character apache_warriors: A large group of hostile 19th-century indigenous warriors characterized by their traditional Apache attire. They function as a collective unit, primarily seen engaged in ambush tactics and active skirmishes while wielding arrows.
storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the high emotional cost of the skirmish through the discovery of a fallen comrade, then pivot immediately into a high-stakes pursuit sequence to drive the transition to the escape phase.

## Required Cast
- John Carter (Younger)
- Captain James K. Powell (Deceased)
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- The trail/valley near the ambush site (specifically narrow trail near cliffside)

## Continuity Constraints
- Arrow placement on Captain James K. Powell (Deceased)
- Physical injury levels on John Carter (Younger)
- Proximity and distance of apache_warriors during pursuit

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of Powell's body
- BT002: Retrieval of the body
- BT003: Flight from pursuit
